must_cover_coverage.all_prior_runs: 2014 lost 4th place 15.7% / 2018 won 2nd place 17.6% / 2022 won primary vs. Augustin Saah & general / 2026 filed 2/3 on slate with Kramer & Stewart
must_cover_coverage.voting_record_by_topic: Criminal-justice reform, family-law reform, juvenile justice, marijuana records expungement; aligned with Black Caucus + Women Legislators of MD on Blueprint and family-leave votes
must_cover_coverage.sponsored_co-sponsored_bills: Lead sponsor HB 147 spousal-defense repeal 2021 + 2022; women's pre-release mediation 2019; first-degree murder review for minors 2021; hate-crime civil action 2022; co-sponsor marijuana expungement multi-session
must_cover_coverage.endorsements_received_and_given: Received: MCEA, MWC AFL-CIO. Given: slate alignment with Kramer + Stewart 2026; specific candidate-to-candidate endorsements not surfaced
must_cover_coverage.controversies_alleged_vs_proven_vs_dismi: Clean record. No ethics complaint, no SBE enforcement action, no lawsuit, no news investigation surfaced. Procedural setback only: 2021 HB 147 Senate dilution
must_cover_coverage.stance_shifts_over_time: None surfaced; criminal-justice + family-law portfolio has been consistent since swearing-in

listener_flagged_topics_addressed_on_air.fiscal_restriction: Bottom line: NO. Crutchfield is not a fiscal-discipline candidate.
listener_flagged_topics_addressed_on_air.Wootton_high_school: MoCo Board of Ed matter (3/26/2026 7-1 'Modified Option H' vote); state appeal pending; D19 GA role is statutory; no public Crutchfield statement
listener_flagged_topics_addressed_on_air.sanctuary_policy: Bottom line: NO opposition. Caucus alignment supports MD's existing limits on local cooperation with federal immigration enforcement
listener_flagged_topics_addressed_on_air.all-history_not_recent_session_only: Episode delivers full historical record from 1986 forward
